titleStmt.title: SII 7.204: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 204. (A.R. No. 35 of 1901). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīraṁ syādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ . jīyāttrailōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . [1 .*] nijanilayatraya
suracitaratnatrayadattirēṣa jinanilayaḥ nilayastrijagacchrīṇāṁtribhuvanacūḍāmaṇiściraṁ jayatu . [2 .*] vilasattauḷava
dēśavēṇupuradoḷcaṁdraprabhāvāsamaṁ nelemūṟuṁ nelemūṟulōkada mahāśrīgeṁbavo ltōrpudaṁ . lalitānē
kavidhāṁgamaṁ tribhuvanīcūḍāmaṇikhyātamaṁ halarāścaryyamadāge māḍisidarā bhavyātmarēṁ dhanyarō . [3 .*] Anuma
tiyaṁ halarkkoḍe niyōgise paṁḍitadēvadēśikargghananilayaṁgaḷoḷnilayamaṁ ramaṇīyamanadvitīyama
ṁ . Anunayadiṁde panneraḍubhāgegaḷūṁdiralatyapūrvvamaṁ manadolaviṁde māḍisida bhavyara puṇyamanēna neṁbudō . [4 .*]
svasti . śrīmadvēṇupurada yeṁṭuprajeseṭṭikāṟaru nālvaru yeḷamegaḷoḷagāda samastahalaru nirmmāpisida tribhuvana
cūḍāmaṇiyeṁba mahācaityālayada yeraḍaneya neleyanu paṁḍitadēvarugaḷa nirūpadiṁdalū hala
ra Anumatiyiṁdalū hanneraḍu bhāgegaḷāgi māḍisida bhavyajanaṁgaḷāreṁdoḍe . puḷḷi seṭṭiya baḷiya koṁḍe kēśavaseṭṭi
Avara taṁma sālma dēvaruseṭṭigaḷige bhāge mūṟu 3 bhāgyaṇna seṭṭiya baḷiya Āḷva nāraṇaseṭṭi Avara Aḷiya kājava kujiṁbaṇna seṭṭige
bhāge Oṁdu 1 saṭṭiseṭṭiya baḷiya kōvāri pāṁḍiseṭṭige bhāge Oṁdu 1 bhāgyaṇna seṭṭiya baḷiya jaṁtri bālyaṁma
seṭṭi Avara taṁmaṁdiru Āḷva śāṁtiseṭṭi Āḷva Aṁmaṇaseṭṭigaḷige bhāge yeraḍu 2 vikrāṁtaseṭṭiya baḷiya caUṭadēvaruseṭṭi Avara ta
ṁma nārāviya padumaṇnaseṭṭigaḷige bhāge 1 puḷḷiseṭṭiya baḷiya jaṁtri varddhamānaseṭṭiya Aḷiyaṁdiru kakke bālidēveseṭṭi kakke dēvēśvaraseṭṭigaḷige bhāge 1
Āryyabaḷiya cennakōṭiseṭṭige bhāge Oṁdu 1 seṭṭiseṭṭiya baḷiya yeḍa kōṭiseṭṭige bhāge Oṁdu 1 vikrāṁta seṭṭi
ya baḷiya pāra kāṁtaṇaseṭṭi Avara taṁma pāra dēvaruseṭṭigaḷige bhāge Oṁdu 1 Aṁtu bhāge hanneraḍu .
Digital edition of SII 7.204 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
